chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.object: unit price at time of order

triplets.subject: ORDER_LINE_ITEM
triplets.object: Individual product lines within a sales order.

triplets.subject: SHIPMENT
triplets.object: Physical delivery of products to customers.

entities_post_resolution.name: Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: A category identifier used as a primary key in a database table to uniquely identify each category.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column**:
| CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO | | **Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment) | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | **Column**:
| CATEGORY_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Category display name | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer
entities_post_resolution.definition: A customer is an individual or entity registered on a platform who makes purchases, receives shipments, and may receive refunds.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | Key Attributes: - Unique Customer ID | Key Attributes: - Valid email address (required for login) | Key Attributes: - One or more delivery/billing addresses | Key Attributes: - Geographic region for tax calculation | Key Attributes: - Active/inactive status | Business Rules: - Must place at least one order to remain active | Business Rules: - Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | Business Rules: - Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | Key Attributes: - References exactly one Customer | A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | **Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Column**:
| FULL_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Customer's full name | NO | | **Column**:
| EMAIL | VARCHAR(150) | Unique email address for login | NO | | **Column**:
| REGION_

entities_post_resolution.name: Line 1
entities_post_resolution.definition: An electronic audio device that uses wireless technology to transmit sound to the user.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each | Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50

entities_post_resolution.name: Line Items
entities_post_resolution.definition: Line items are individual product entries within a sales order, detailing specific products and their prices.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. | Each captures the price at the moment of ordering. | - A Sales Order must contain at least one line item

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Date
entities_post_resolution.definition: Order ID is a unique identifier assigned to each sales order in the system.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column**:
| ORDER_DATE | DATE | Date order was placed | NO | | **Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | - ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | Key Attributes: - Unique Order ID | Key Attributes: - Order date when transaction was initiated

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: An Order Line Item is a specific product or service entry within a sales order, representing a single item being purchased.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Key Attributes: - Must contain at least one Order Line Item | An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | **Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order. | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items

entities_post_resolution.name: Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: An order is a transaction initiated by a customer to purchase products, identified by a unique order ID and broken down into individual line items.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Key Attributes: - Unique Order ID | Key Attributes: - References exactly one Customer | Key Attributes: - Order date when transaction was initiated | Key Attributes: - Total monetary value | Key Attributes: - Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED | Key Attributes: - Must contain at least one Order Line Item | Business Rules: - Cannot be shipped until payment is confirmed | Business Rules: - Can only be cancelled if not yet shipped | Business Rules: - Status changes are logged for audit purposes | Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | **Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases.

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A payment is a monetary transaction used to settle the amount due for a sales order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: References exactly one Sales Order | Payment amount | Confirmation timestamp | A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | **Description**: Monetary transactions settling order amounts. | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Product
entities_post_resolution.definition: An item or good offered for sale or used within a business, characterized by attributes such as product ID and name.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Key Attributes: - Unique SKU code | Key Attributes: - Human-readable product name | Key Attributes: - Unit price in base currency (EUR) | Key Attributes: - Active/inactive status | Key Attributes: - Belongs to exactly one Category | Business Rules: - Must belong to a valid category before being sold | Key Attributes: - References exactly one Product | An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | **Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Column**:
| SKU | VARCHAR(50) | Stock Keeping Unit code | NO | | **Column**:
| PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO | | **Column**:
| CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO | | **Column**:
| UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO | | **Column**:
| IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether currently for sale | NO | | - PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each | Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50 | Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A shipment is the physical delivery of products from a seller to a customer, typically associated with a sales order and tracked via a shipment identifier.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: References exactly one Sales Order | Tracking number | Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | **Description**: Physical delivery of products to customers. | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | A Sales Order has one or more Shipments | Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments.

entities_post_resolution.name: Sku
entities_post_resolution.definition: A SKU (Stock Keeping Unit) is a unique alphanumeric code used to identify and track individual products in inventory management.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column**:
| SKU | VARCHAR(50) | Stock Keeping Unit code | NO | | Key Attributes: - Unique SKU code

entities_post_resolution.name: Status
entities_post_resolution.definition: Status refers to the current condition or stage of an order or process, indicating its progress or state.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Key Attributes: - Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED | Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Product(Category Id)
entities_post_resolution.definition: TB_PRODUCT is an entity representing a product in the business domain, with attributes such as PRODUCT_ID and CATEGORY_ID.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | - PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID)

entities_post_resolution.name: Unit Price
entities_post_resolution.definition: The unit price is the cost assigned to a single unit of a product or service, typically expressed in a specific currency.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column**:
| UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO | | - Unit price is fixed and does not change with future price updates | Key Attributes: - Unit price in base currency (EUR)

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: A refund is a reimbursement issued to a customer, typically after a product return or order cancellation.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: This table stores core information about customers, including their contact details and account status.

tables_enriched.name: Product Table
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about products available in the inventory, including identifiers, names, categories, pricing, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about product categories and their hierarchical relationships.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: This table stores header information for sales orders, including order details, status, payment confirmation, and delivery timestamps.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: This table stores detailed information about each product line item within customer orders, including quantities, prices, and total amounts.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: This table stores records of payments made for sales orders, including payment details, status, and timestamps.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about shipments, including shipment identifiers, associated order references, warehouse locations, shipment dates, tracking details, and current shipment status.
